note: Fixed 2 failing tests (LogsEachFailureAtErrorLevel, LogsIterationFailedForEachFailure) and 1 incorrectly passing test (ContinuesRunningAfterMultipleConsecutiveFailures). Root causes: (1) scheduleIntervalMinutes=60 prevented multiple job iterations within 10s test timeout — changed to 0 for tests needing multiple iterations; (2) StringWriter thread-safety — added job.StopAsync() before reading logs; (3) Race condition in recovery test — poll tracker state instead of request count. All 7 tests now pass.
